identity.name: AnyWork
identity.mission: Connect people who need help with trusted local experts in the UK.
identity.aesthetic: Apple-like Minimalist, Clean, Soft Shadows, White Space

headings.usage: Use for all section titles, hero text, and card headings. Letter spacing tight (-0.02em).

body.usage: Use for descriptions, labels, and long-form text. Relaxed line height (1.6).

typography.installation: Import fonts via Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&family=Manrope:wght@500;600;700;800&display=swap');

primary.name: Royal Blue
primary.usage: Primary buttons, active states, trust indicators, links.

secondary.name: Vibrant Coral
secondary.usage: Secondary actions, 'Urgent' tags, notification dots, heart icons.

buttons.primary: bg-[#0052CC] hover:bg-[#0043A6] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold transition-all shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all hover:border-slate-300

cards.base: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 overflow-hidden group

inputs.base: rounded-xl border-slate-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0052CC]/20 focus:border-[#0052CC] transition-all bg-white

hero_background.usage: Hero section background or side image

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Install 'lucide-react' for icons. Use 'Manrope' for all headings and 'Inter' for body text.
2. THEME: Force Light Mode. Do not implement a dark mode toggle unless critical. The brand is 'Clean & White'.
3. COMPONENTS: Use Shadcn UI components but override the default radius to '0.75rem' or '1rem' to match the 'Apple-like' aesthetic. Avoid sharp corners.
4. LAYOUT: Use the 'Bento' grid strategy for the 'Popular Tasks' section on the homepage.
5. TRUST: Add 'Verified' badges (check-circle icon in Royal Blue) to helper cards. Use the 'Glassmorphism' style for the sticky navbar.
6. MAPS: Use a placeholder div with a subtle map background pattern for the 'Browse Helpers' map view if MapLibre is not fully configured yet.
7. TESTING: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, cards).
8. IMAGES: Use the provided image URLs. Do not use placeholders.
9. CONTRAST: Ensure all text on colored backgrounds meets WCAG AA standards. Use white text on Royal Blue buttons.
universal_guidelines: Avoid generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry where possible.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs (e.g., p-8, p-12).
Never use pure black (#000000). Use Slate-900 (#0F172A).
Add micro-interactions to every button and card (hover scale, shadow lift).
Do not use 'transparent' backgrounds for dropdowns or modals. Use white with blur.
